<final_evaluation>
{
    "Q1": {
        "Q": "How many unique items are indescribable (cannot be represented in the template)?",
        "A": "2, ['Request to prepare a summary comparison with the current €510/month plan (the template supports coverage and cost comparisons, but not referencing a specific existing plan by cost value)', 'Offer to issue enrollment documents (template includes documentation status fields like signature_required and delivery_method, but not the explicit action of issuing or sending documents)']"
    },
    "Q2": {
        "Q": "How many unique items are describable (can be represented in the template)?",
        "A": "12, ['Health insurance plan details including physical, mental, and wellness programs (maps to insurance_plans and health_insurance_specific)', 'Telemedicine, gym reimbursement, preventive care, stress management, and family therapy coverage (health_insurance_specific)', 'Property insurance with liability protection, temporary accommodation, natural disaster and recreation equipment coverage (property_insurance_specific)', 'Travel insurance with adventure sports, medical evacuation, trip cancellation/delay, and multilingual global assistance (travel_insurance_specific and service_features)', 'Add-on services for adventure travel and premium medical network (specialized_coverage)', 'Monthly and annual costs for each plan (cost_analysis)', 'Total monthly and annual cost (cost_analysis)', 'Immediate enrollment availability (availability_status → immediate_processing_available)', '24/7 support (service_features → customer_support_hours)', 'Direct billing and priority claims (service_features)', 'Plans currently available (availability_status → plan_currently_available)', 'Communication type matching proposal presentation or binding confirmation (communication_type)']"
    }
}
</final_evaluation>

Q1.A: 2, ['Request to prepare a summary comparison with the current €510/month plan (the template supports coverage and cost comparisons, but not referencing a specific existing plan by cost value)', 'Offer to issue enrollment documents (template includes documentation status fields like signature_required and delivery_method, but not the explicit action of issuing or sending documents)']

Q2.Q: How many unique items are describable (can be represented in the template)?
Q2.A: 12, ['Health insurance plan details including physical, mental, and wellness programs (maps to insurance_plans and health_insurance_specific)', 'Telemedicine, gym reimbursement, preventive care, stress management, and family therapy coverage (health_insurance_specific)', 'Property insurance with liability protection, temporary accommodation, natural disaster and recreation equipment coverage (property_insurance_specific)', 'Travel insurance with adventure sports, medical evacuation, trip cancellation/delay, and multilingual global assistance (travel_insurance_specific and service_features)', 'Add-on services for adventure travel and premium medical network (specialized_coverage)', 'Monthly and annual costs for each plan (cost_analysis)', 'Total monthly and annual cost (cost_analysis)', 'Immediate enrollment availability (availability_status → immediate_processing_available)', '24/7 support (service_features → customer_support_hours)', 'Direct billing and priority claims (service_features)', 'Plans currently available (availability_status → plan_currently_available)', 'Communication type matching proposal presentation or binding confirmation (communication_type)']
